headline: JPMorgan, KeyBanc Update Views on Consolidated Edison (ED) while Maintaining Underweight Ratings
summary: Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) is included among the 14 Quality Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 12, JPMorgan raised its price recommendation on Consolidated Edison, Inc. (NYSE:ED) to $113 from $107. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares. The firm said it had updated its models across the North American utilities group. On March 4, […]
